samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>A traffic light controller with red, yellow, green signals and a pedestrian request signal.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Request signal for pedestrians to cross.</input>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter value.</output>
        <output id="red">Red signal for the traffic light.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow signal for the traffic light.</output>
        <output id="green">Green signal for the traffic light.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="idle">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="s1_red">State after red signal.</state>
        <state id="s2_yellow">State after yellow signal.</state>
        <state id="s3_green">State after green signal.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter for timing control.</reg>
        <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state of the traffic light controller.</reg>
        <reg id="p_red">Previous value of the red signal.</reg>
        <reg id="p_yellow">Previous value of the yellow signal.</reg>
        <reg id="p_green">Previous value of the green signal.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= 2'd0;
                p_red <= 1'b0;
                p_yellow <= 1'b0;
                p_green <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                case (state)
                    2'd0: begin // idle
                        p_red <= 1'b0;
                        p_yellow <= 1'b0;
                        p_green <= 1'b0;
                        state <= 2'd1;
                    end
                    2'd1: begin // s1_red
                        p_red <= 1'b1;
                        if (cnt == 8'd3) begin
                            state <= 2'd3;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd1;
                        end
                    end
                    2'd2: begin // s2_yellow
                        p_yellow <= 1'b1;
                        if (cnt == 8'd3) begin
                            state <= 2'd1;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd2;
                        end
                    end
                    2'd3: begin // s3_green
                        p_green <= 1'b1;
                        if (cnt == 8'd3) begin
                            state <= 2'd2;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd3;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        
        // Counter logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else begin
                if (pass_request && green) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd10;
                end else if (!green && p_green) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd60;
                end else if (!yellow && p_yellow) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd5;
                end else if (!red && p_red) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd10;
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt - 8'd1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Output assignment
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                red <= 1'b0;
                yellow <= 1'b0;
                green <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                red <= p_red;
                yellow <= p_yellow;
                green <= p_green;
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
